title: GOOD: onclose drains pending map to unblock all in-flight requests
description: The onclose handler in WasmTransport iterates the pending HashMap and sends Err("disconnected") on every waiting oneshot sender before clearing the map. This means any caller awaiting send_request() will receive an Err immediately when the connection drops, rather than waiting forever. The alternative is to leave the pending map populated; callers would then hang until they are individually garbage-collected or the JS runtime reclaims them — an invisible deadlock in the browser. The drain-on-close approach converts an invisible hang into an explicit error that the caller can surface to the user.
